headline: William Blair Remains a Buy on AppLovin (APP), Here’s Why
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the Best Young Stocks To Buy and Hold For 20 Years. On March 11, William Blair reiterated an Outperform rating on AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) without disclosing any price targets. ​The firm reiterated bullish sentiment on the stock after AppLovin’s investor meeting. CEO Adam Foroughi, CFO Matt Stumpf, and head […]
